ddls:
CREATE TABLE "works" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the work */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the work */,
  "warnings" TEXT /* Any content warnings associated with the work */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the work (e.g., General Audiences) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the work (e.g., F/M, M/M) */,
  "fandom" TEXT /* Fandom associated with the work */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Character relationships within the story */,
  "characters" TEXT /* Characters featured in the work */,
  "additional_tags" TEXT /* Additional tags for categorization */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the work is written */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the work was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the work (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the last status update */,
  "words" INTEGER /* Word count of the work */,
  "chapters" TEXT /* Number of chapters in the work */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the work */,
  "kudos" INTEGER /* Number of kudos received */,
  "bookmarks" INTEGER /* Number of bookmarks */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits the work has received */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or description of the work */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator responsible for the work */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the work was last updated */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_works_fandom FOREIGN KEY ("fandom") REFERENCES fandoms ("fandom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_works_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the author joined the platform */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the author */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography or description of the author */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the author */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the author */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of authors the author is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fandoms" (
  "fandom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fandom */,
  "fandom_name" TEXT /* Name of the fandom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fandom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_genres" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_categories" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_languages" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_characters" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id", "character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_relationships" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id", "relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_tags" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Author, Reader, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Assigned role in the platform */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hits" (
  "hit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hit entry */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work that received the hit */,
  "hit_date" TEXT /* Date when the hit occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hits_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work associated with the engagement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the work */,
  "kudos" INTEGER /* Number of kudos given by the user */,
  "bookmarks" INTEGER /* Number of bookmarks made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_story_engagement_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_story_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_chapters" (
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chapter */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work to which the chapter belongs */,
  "chapter_number" INTEGER /* Number of the chapter in the work */,
  "chapter_title" TEXT /* Title of the chapter */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the chapter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_story_chapters_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work whose status is being tracked */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the work (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_story_status_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id")
)
